caption: A person wearing a dark grey sweater and a gold-toned watch on their left wrist works on a craft project atop a white surface. A blue rectangular piece of paper rests on a white grid cutting mat. To the left is a card with a floral design and the text, "D YOU LITTLE belleide Cheer You warm my heart". In the beginning, the person holds the blue paper with their left hand while using their right hand to sprinkle white glitter from a small plastic shaker bottle onto the paper. As the sequence progresses, the person lifts the blue paper to shake off the excess glitter before laying it flat back down on the cutting mat. The person's hands are the central focus, moving the materials across the white workspace.
